assessment: Public health endpoint is reachable outside k6.
production-traffic.js has no explicit k6 check() block; k6 failure rate may be based on HTTP status classes rather than custom pass criteria.
production-traffic.js appears to run tight loops without sleep(); this can create unrealistic request flooding and distort production readiness results.
multi-agent-concurrent.js has no explicit k6 check() block; k6 failure rate may be based on HTTP status classes rather than custom pass criteria.
multi-agent-concurrent.js appears to run tight loops without sleep(); this can create unrealistic request flooding and distort production readiness results.
next_action: Review script targets and request pacing before changing backend scaling.
